<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
I have picked up the glass \(object tagged 37\) and the plate \(object tagged 57\) as requested. Then, I placed both of them on the floor at coordinates near my current location. The glass is slightly to the right of the plate on the floor. Let me know if you need any further assistance.
